title: Customer
description: Buyer/customer contact info attached to lead.* AAP request payloads (which travel inside an A2A DataPart). ADF-compatible: at least one of email or phone MUST be present when the customer block is included. When customer is present a ConsentGrant MUST also be present.

phone.description: Customer phone in E.164 format, e.g. +14155550123.

preferred_contact.description: Channel preferred for follow-up. 'sms' is treated as text-message via 'phone'.

address.description: Optional postal address (used for residency, registration, or remote delivery).
